ALT Blood Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an ALT Blood Test? 
An ALT test measures the amount of ALT in your blood. This test is commonly used to help diagnose liver damage or disease .
ALT (alanine transaminase) is an enzyme, a protein that speeds up certain chemical reactions in your body. It is found mainly in your liver. Usually, you will have low levels of ALT in your blood. But when liver cells are damaged, they release
